description: Templates for citizen-to-government documents that Raksha AI can generate

cannot_generate.reason: Requires stamp paper, notarization, court filing, or advocate signature
cannot_generate.redirect: Contact a licensed advocate. Free legal aid: NALSA helpline 15100 or visit https://nalsa.gov.in

complaint_letter.description: Formal complaint to a government department or authority

required_fields.ask: What is your full name?
What is your address?
What is your phone number?
What is your email? (optional)
Which officer/department are you complaining to?
What is the office address? (if known)
Do you have an application or reference number?
When did you originally file/apply?
What is the problem? (delay, rejection, non-response, etc.)
Have you already complained or followed up? If yes, when and how?
What do you want them to do? (process application, refund, etc.)

complaint_letter.format:
To,
[AUTHORITY_NAME]
[AUTHORITY_ADDRESS]

Date: [DATE]

Subject: [SUBJECT WITH REFERENCE NUMBERS]

Respected Sir/Madam,

[PARA 1: Introduction — who I am, what I applied for, when, reference number]
[PARA 2: The problem — what went wrong, SLA breach if applicable]
[PARA 3: Previous attempts — complaints, visits, calls made]
[PARA 4: Relief sought — what I want, with timeline]

I request you to kindly look into this matter and take appropriate action within [15/30] days, failing which I shall be compelled to approach higher authorities / file an RTI application / approach the consumer forum.

Thanking you,
[USER_NAME]
[USER_ADDRESS]
[USER_PHONE]
[USER_EMAIL]

Enclosures:
1. Copy of application/receipt
2. Previous correspondence (if any)
3. Supporting documents

rti_application.description: Application under Right to Information Act, 2005

required_fields.ask: What is your full name?
What is your address?
What is your phone number?
What is your email?
Which department/office do you want information from?
What is the department address? (if known)
Do you have a reference/application number related to this?
What specific information do you want? (file status, officer name, reason for delay, copies of documents, etc.)
How will you pay the Rs. 10 fee? (Indian Postal Order / Demand Draft / Online at rtionline.gov.in)
How do you want the information? (hard copy by post / email)

rti_application.format:
To,
The Central/State Public Information Officer
[DEPARTMENT]
[DEPARTMENT_ADDRESS]

Subject: Application under Right to Information Act, 2005

Sir/Madam,

I, [USER_NAME], resident of [USER_ADDRESS], hereby request the following information under the Right to Information Act, 2005:

1. [QUESTION 1]
2. [QUESTION 2]
3. [QUESTION 3]
4. [QUESTION 4]

I am depositing the prescribed fee of Rs. 10/- via [PAYMENT_MODE].

Please provide the information in [PREFERRED_FORMAT].

Yours faithfully,
[USER_NAME]
[USER_ADDRESS]
[USER_PHONE]
[USER_EMAIL]

Date: [DATE]

first_appeal_rti.description: First Appeal when RTI response not received within 30 days

required_fields.ask: What is your full name?
What is your address?
When did you file the original RTI?
What is the RTI application reference number?
Which department was the RTI filed with?
Name of First Appellate Authority (senior officer of the department — if unknown, I'll use the designation)
What information did you originally request?

first_appeal_rti.format:
To,
The First Appellate Authority
[FIRST_APPELLATE_AUTHORITY]
[DEPARTMENT]

Subject: First Appeal under Section 19(1) of the Right to Information Act, 2005

Sir/Madam,

I, [USER_NAME], had filed an RTI application dated [ORIGINAL_RTI_DATE] (Reference: [ORIGINAL_RTI_REFERENCE]) with the PIO of [DEPARTMENT], requesting the following information:

[INFORMATION_REQUESTED]

The prescribed period of 30 days has elapsed and I have not received any response / I have received an incomplete response.

I hereby file this First Appeal under Section 19(1) of the RTI Act, 2005, and request that the information be provided at the earliest.

Yours faithfully,
[USER_NAME]
[USER_ADDRESS]
[USER_PHONE]
[USER_EMAIL]

Date: [DATE]

Enclosure: Copy of original RTI application and proof of filing

grievance_text.description: Short text for pasting into online portals (CPGRAMS, consumer forum, EPFO, etc.)

required_fields.ask: What is your full name?
Reference/application number?
Which department?
When did you file?
Describe the problem briefly
What action do you want?

grievance_text.format:
Grievance regarding [APPLICATION_NUMBER] filed on [FILED_DATE] with [DEPARTMENT].

[ISSUE_DESCRIPTION]

Despite the prescribed timeline, no action has been taken. Previous follow-ups on [DATES] have not yielded results.

Requested action: [RELIEF_SOUGHT]

Applicant: [USER_NAME]
Contact: [USER_PHONE]

email_draft.description: Professional email to bank, insurance, employer, or nodal officer

required_fields.ask: What is your full name?
Who are you emailing? (bank manager, nodal officer, insurance company, etc.)
Account/policy/reference number?
What is the problem?
What do you want them to do?
Have you already contacted them? When?

email_draft.format:
Subject: [CLEAR SUBJECT WITH REFERENCE NUMBER]

Dear [RECIPIENT],

[PARA 1: Account/policy details and the issue]
[PARA 2: Timeline of events and previous attempts]
[PARA 3: Specific action requested with deadline]
[PARA 4: Mention regulatory escalation if no response — RBI Ombudsman / IRDAI / Consumer Forum]

Please resolve this within [7/15] days, failing which I will be compelled to escalate to [REGULATORY BODY].

Regards,
[USER_NAME]
[USER_PHONE]
[USER_EMAIL]
